scripts.test: pnpm test:node && vp test run --config vite.test.config.ts
scripts.check: vp check src e2e vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vite.test.config.ts vite.node.config.ts playwright.config.ts && vize lint
scripts.check:fix: vp check --fix src e2e vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vite.test.config.ts vite.node.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && cargo build --release -p vize_vitrine --no-default-features --features wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/vize_vitrine.wasm --out-dir playground/src/wasm --target web
